{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320153156F137940B545D49512808\"}"},"total":45},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6816400636524003328","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好，没有生搬硬套，天马行空贴入生活，赏得真实。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1587066965,"group_id":"6569997636122708999","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N59A4zklw3Tei3xnJUF26Tg=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"9913816349","user_name":"用户名74870000"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"9913816349","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6569997636122708999","book_info":{"abstract":"因为一本神秘的金色古籍，徐天涯来到一处神秘的世界，在这个世界中修士是这个世界的主导力量，成为这个世界的一员后，徐天涯不得不为了生存而慢慢和这个世界融合在一起，在这个过程中那本神秘古籍中的摩陀心经功法给予了徐天涯很大的帮助。在云雨村内徐天涯本来想要慢慢修炼安然在这个世界上度过自己一生，不过大汉和明国这两个国家的战争却使得徐天涯不得不面对鬼道三宗这个强悍的敌人，在和鬼道修士的斗争中，徐天涯渐渐成为大汉有名的仙师，并且得到了大汉国皇帝的赏识，从而开始了自己传奇的一生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/cb222a646faf3e69cdecc3e5958c9376~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"璇玑心德","author_id":"","book_id":"6569997636122708999","book_name":"狂仙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"na
